context.//baseCapacity: Always-on reserved Macs = concurrent build slots. Each instance bills ~$25-30/day whether idle or busy; builds beyond the count QUEUE (ON_DEMAND is unavailable for MAC_ARM). Size to PEAK concurrency, not headcount. Default 1 (sequential).
context.//vpc: OPTIONAL — set these to run builds inside your VPC (reach private Nexus, internal validation services). Leave empty for no VPC. subnetIds/securityGroupIds are comma-separated.
context.//createVpcEndpoints: When VPC mode is on, also create S3 + CloudWatch Logs + CodeBuild VPC endpoints so a private no-NAT subnet works. Set false if your VPC already has a NAT gateway.
context.//cacheMode: Tighten the fix->retest loop by reusing DerivedData + SPM between builds. 'local' (default; cache persists on the warm reserved Mac, fastest, best for one shared project across many apps), 'none' (every build cold, for always-clean validation), or 's3' (durable cache in the artifacts bucket, survives instance replacement, best paired with one-project-per-app). Per-call clean_build forces a cold run without changing this.
